name: Roadmap invariant / sprint / gap keyword index
what_it_solves: Every hit of `sprint 4s|invariant|closed at|gap exploit|underpowered|POLE|RUO|VALIDATED never|frozen_receipt|receipt immutability|tier clamp|apply_rs_promotion` in the roadmap.
how_it_solves: Case-insensitive regex + 240-char context window per hit.
why_it_exists: Cross-references the 8 invariant entities in stream_sl.json to their exact roadmap locations, so 'the invariant is in the code' claims are verifiable.
